allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" } catch { "Backend ainda nao respondeu: $_" })
PowerShell(where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\$env:USERNAME\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
